key_claim: Different human dataset properties predict the magnitude of distribution shifts in recursive LLM training loops.
methodology: exhaustive manipulation of dataset properties combined with regression analyses
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether physically-verified authentic human behavioral data could prevent these distribution shifts.

key_claim: Without enough fresh real data in each generation, autophagous generative models are doomed to degrade.
methodology: analytical and empirical analysis using state-of-the-art generative image models across three autophagous loop families
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not explore what specific types of fresh real data are most effective at preventing model collapse.

key_claim: Model collapse in diffusion models manifests as a transition from generalization to memorization driven by declining entropy.
methodology: analysis of diffusion models during iterative training on synthetic samples measuring entropy changes
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not investigate whether authentic human behavioral data maintains higher entropy than web-scraped data.

key_claim: Data diversity in LLM-generated data significantly affects downstream model performance and collapse prevention.
methodology: controlled experiments varying diversity levels in LLM-generated training data
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not compare diversity levels between synthetic data and authentic human social behavioral data.

key_claim: Native biomedical instruction data yields strongest performance, while mixed native-translated setups provide optimal results.
methodology: fine-tuning Qwen-4B-Instruct across seven configurations combining native, synthetic, and translated data sources
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not assess whether native data represents authentic human behavioral patterns versus web-scraped content.

key_claim: LLM-generated text tends to occupy negative curvature regions of the model's log probability function.
methodology: mathematical analysis of LLM probability function geometry and curvature-based detection criterion
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether authentic human behavioral data exhibits different geometric properties than synthetic text.

key_claim: Without enough fresh real data, autophagous generative models progressively decrease in quality or diversity.
methodology: analysis using state-of-the-art generative image models across three autophagous loop families
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not specify what constitutes sufficient fresh real data or its optimal sources.

key_claim: SynthID-Text enables high-accuracy watermark detection with minimal quality impact and computational overhead.
methodology: production-ready watermarking scheme modifying only LLM sampling procedure
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how watermarking affects the information diversity and authenticity of training corpora.

key_claim: LLM-generated text detection is imperative to mitigate misuse and protect artistic expression and social networks.
methodology: comprehensive survey of watermarking techniques and statistics-based detection methods
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether detection methods can differentiate between high-quality human behavioral data and synthetic content.

key_claim: SIMS training concept can prevent model autophagy disorder by treating synthetic data differently from real data.
methodology: novel training framework that differentiates synthetic and real data in diffusion models
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to identify and preserve authentic human behavioral signals in web-scraped training data.

key_claim: SIGMA framework provides mathematically grounded metrics to track model collapse through spectral analysis of embedding matrices.
methodology: spectral analysis using deterministic and stochastic bounds on Gram matrix spectrum
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to distinguish between collapse caused by synthetic data versus natural entropy decline in web data.

key_claim: Optimal ratio of synthetic to human-generated data ensures asymptotically stable equilibrium preventing model degeneration.
methodology: differential equation modeling of generative model evolution during retraining
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to identify authentic human behavioral data within degraded web-scraped training corpora.

key_claim: External synthetic data verification by humans or better models prevents model collapse during synthetic retraining.
methodology: theoretical analysis in linear regression setting with verifier-guided retraining
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether human verification can recover the unique behavioral signals present in physically-verified authentic data.

key_claim: Model collapse in generative models can be studied through learning-theoretic perspective with replay mechanisms.
methodology: learning-theoretic analysis of model collapse with language generation replay
what_it_does_NOT_address: How replay mechanisms could prioritize authentic human behavioral data over synthetic content.

key_claim: FedTREK-LM substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods in federated personalized recommendations using lightweight LLMs.
methodology: federated learning with personal knowledge graphs and Qwen3 models (0.6B, 1.7B, 4B parameters)
what_it_does_NOT_address: How federated learning preserves authentic human behavioral signals from web degradation.

key_claim: Recursive training on contaminated mixtures of human and AI-generated data leads to model collapse beyond simplified settings.
methodology: theoretical analysis extending beyond discrete/Gaussian assumptions to general contaminated recursive training
limitation: existing work examined only highly simplified discrete or Gaussian settings
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to identify and preserve irreplaceable human behavioral signals during contaminated recursive training.

key_claim: Latent Space Filtering mitigates model collapse by filtering out less realistic synthetic data based on latent representation quality.
methodology: empirical analysis of latent space dynamics in self-consuming diffusion models across generations
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether authentic human behavioral data provides superior training signals than filtered synthetic data.

key_claim: Neon method turns self-training degradation into improvement signal by counterintuitively reversing fine-tuning on synthetic data.
methodology: fine-tuning base model on self-synthesized data then reversing the process
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not compare performance against training on verified authentic human-generated data.

key_claim: Pre-training on 1/3 rephrased synthetic data mixed with 2/3 natural web texts speeds up training 5-10x.
methodology: large-scale empirical investigation training over 1000 LLMs with unified protocol and scaling laws
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not assess whether web data itself suffers from information degradation compared to verified human behavioral data.

key_claim: AI models can autonomously generate and validate new knowledge through direct environmental interaction without human benchmarks.
methodology: framework using unbounded numeric rewards to guide autonomous knowledge generation and validation
limitation: mentions mitigating model collapse and warm start problem
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how to ensure training data authenticity or prevent degradation of human-derived signals.

key_claim: Machine-generated text detection can prevent language model collapse by identifying synthetic content in training data.
methodology: investigation of decoding strategy impact on model collapse analyzing text characteristics and performance
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not explore whether physically-verified human data provides fundamentally different training signals than detected-clean web data.

key_claim: KoLMogorov-Test provides compression-based intelligence evaluation for code generating LLMs through shortest program generation.
methodology: compression-as-intelligence test requiring models to generate shortest programs producing given sequences
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address data quality or authenticity issues in training corpora used by evaluated models.

key_claim: Current SSL methods struggle to improve from unlabeled synthetic images and are sometimes negatively affected by them.
methodology: evaluation of SSL methods on new RS-SSL benchmark with synthetic image contamination
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not investigate whether authentic human-verified image data provides superior learning signals than clean real images.

key_claim: Existing LLM-based multi-agent planning frameworks have significant weaknesses when exposed to fraudulent information in real-world data.
methodology: evaluation using WandaPlan environment with injected deceptive content across three fraud scenarios
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not explore whether training on verified authentic human behavioral data could improve fraud resistance.

key_claim: LLMs trained on their own output exhibit self-consuming training loops that reduce quality and diversity
methodology: novel method based on logic expressions to verify correctness of LLM-generated content
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether physically-verified authentic human data can prevent self-consuming loops better than web-scraped data

key_claim: Indiscriminate use of model-generated content causes irreversible model collapse where distribution tails disappear
methodology: empirical analysis of training LLMs on recursively generated data
what_it_does_NOT_address: How authentic human behavioral data might preserve distribution tails better than synthetic content

key_claim: Training on model-generated content causes irreversible defects where distribution tails disappear
methodology: analysis of model collapse in Variational Autoencoders and language models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether physically-verified human data provides more stable training signals than web-scraped synthetic content

key_claim: Comprehensive evaluation of LLMs requires assessment across task-level and society-level dimensions
methodology: comprehensive review of LLM evaluation methods across three dimensions
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to evaluate training data authenticity and its impact on model performance

key_claim: Accumulating real and synthetic data over time can break the curse of model collapse
methodology: pretraining sequences of language models on text corpora with data accumulation
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human behavioral data provides fundamentally different signals than accumulated web text

key_claim: Model collapse manifests as changes in scaling laws when synthetic data enters training corpora
methodology: theoretical framework analyzing model collapse through scaling laws lens
what_it_does_NOT_address: How scaling laws differ when training on authentic human behavioral data versus web-scraped content
theoretical_framework: scaling laws framework for model collapse

key_claim: HELM provides holistic evaluation across 7 metrics and 16 scenarios for language model transparency
methodology: multi-metric evaluation across broad subset of scenarios and metrics
limitation: noting what's missing or underrepresented in coverage
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to benchmark the quality and authenticity of training data sources

key_claim: Training generative models on mixed real and synthetic datasets has measurable stability impacts
methodology: theoretical framework for studying impact of training on mixed datasets
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether physically-verified human data provides more stable training than web-scale mixed datasets
theoretical_framework: framework for mixed dataset training analysis

key_claim: AI-generated scientific text contains subtle errors that are harder to spot than obvious ones.
methodology: feature description framework analyzing syntax, semantics, and pragmatics through human evaluation
what_it_does_NOT_address: How the quality degradation of AI-generated content affects future model training when recycled.

key_claim: Self-consuming generative models with curated data provably optimize human preferences under certain conditions.
methodology: theoretical analysis of self-consuming generative models with human feedback curation
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether human curation itself degrades over time as authentic behavioral signals become scarce.

key_claim: Closed-loop training of generative models leads to knowledge collapse and distribution degeneration.
methodology: small scale empirical experiments on closed-loop training stability
what_it_does_NOT_address: How physically-verified authentic human data could prevent or reverse this collapse process.

key_claim: Proper curation of synthetic data can ensure continual LLM performance improvement without collapse.
methodology: theoretical framework inspired by boosting algorithms for synthetic data curation
what_it_does_NOT_address: What constitutes authentic non-synthetic data sources as synthetic content proliferates web-wide.

key_claim: Uniform synthetic data format causes pattern overfitting and reduces instruction-following capabilities.
methodology: unlearning techniques applied to mitigate Q-A synthetic data flaws
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether diverse authentic human behavioral data could replace synthetic Q-A pairs entirely.

key_claim: LLMs require statistical foundations due to data dependency and stochastic generation processes.
methodology: argumentative analysis of statistical foundations needed for LLMs
what_it_does_NOT_address: How statistical methods could preserve authentic human behavioral signals in training data.

key_claim: AI-generated medical data contamination erodes pathological variability and diagnostic reliability.
methodology: analysis of 800,000+ synthetic data points across clinical text, vision-to-language, and image synthesis
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human-verified medical behavioral data could restore lost pathological diversity.

key_claim: Uniform synthetic data format causes pattern overfitting and reduces instruction-following capabilities.
methodology: unlearning techniques applied to mitigate Q-A synthetic data flaws
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether diverse authentic human behavioral data could replace synthetic Q-A pairs entirely.

key_claim: Model collapse can be characterized directly from next-token probability distributions using new measures called surplexity.
methodology: mathematical analysis of next-token probability distributions to develop collapse measures
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether physically-verified authentic human data provides superior training signals compared to web-scraped content.

key_claim: Dynamic center-edge sampling can mitigate model collapse in iterative self-training through real-time adaptation.
methodology: dynamic data selection framework with real-time feedback mechanism
limitation: predominantly rely on static strategies, lacking a feedback mechanism capable of adapting in real-time
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether the fundamental issue is web-scraped data quality rather than sampling strategy.

key_claim: Self-Generative Adversarial LLM achieves alignment through generative adversarial game within a single LLM without external rewards.
methodology: unified fine-tuning framework formulating alignment as generative adversarial game
limitation: often rely on heuristic assumptions or ungrounded self-evaluation, which can cause bias accumulation
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether authentic human behavioral data could provide more reliable training signals than synthetic adversarial approaches.

key_claim: Utility-weighted Direct Preference Optimization improves synthetic text quality for classification by combining classifier and similarity scores.
methodology: preference optimization framework combining task-specific classifier scores with embedding-based similarity scores
limitation: standard preference optimization often produces samples that are fluent but weakly label-specific
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether human-authored data would provide more reliable class-specific signals than optimized synthetic data.

key_claim: Attention-graph spectra reveal training-free mechanistic insights exposing connectivity failures missed by standard evaluation across 12 models.
methodology: spectral analysis of attention graphs computing algebraic connectivity and spectral entropy across models and languages
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not investigate whether spectral degradation patterns correlate with web-scraped data quality issues.

key_claim: Human-AI collaborative framework can generate trustworthy benchmark datasets for evaluating sustainability rating methodologies using LLMs.
methodology: human-AI collaboration framework using LLMs to construct firm-level benchmark datasets with principled criteria
limitation: sustainability ratings across agencies for a single company vary widely, limiting their comparability
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether LLM-generated benchmarks suffer from the same web-scraped data biases as the underlying models.

key_claim: LLMs exhibit persistent failures on long-tail knowledge despite scaling, requiring structured analysis across technical and sociotechnical dimensions.
methodology: structured taxonomy and analytical framework synthesizing prior work across four complementary axes
limitation: persistent failures on low-frequency, domain-specific, cultural, and temporal knowledge remain poorly characterized
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether long-tail knowledge degradation stems from web-scraping bias toward high-frequency content.

key_claim: Models can improve when trained on contaminated data if sufficient fresh information from true target distribution is maintained.
methodology: statistical analysis of iterative evolution in next-token prediction with mixture of true target and synthetic distributions
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not distinguish between different sources of 'fresh information' or examine authentic human behavioral data specifically.

key_claim: Watermarking can mitigate model collapse from training on generated content by embedding detectable signals in generated images
methodology: watermarking implementation for bitwise autoregressive image generation models
what_it_does_NOT_address: How watermarking affects the quality or diversity of training data over time

key_claim: Constitutional AI can effectively increase performance when applied to smaller LLaMA 3-8B model
methodology: replicating Constitutional AI workflow on LLaMA 3-8B model
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether Constitutional AI training preserves authentic human behavioral patterns in training data

key_claim: Rejection sampling from posterior uncertainty distribution prevents model collapse and improves performance by 39.9% in sparse data scenarios
methodology: rejection sampling from volumetric uncertainty estimator combined with spatial coverage for view augmentation
what_it_does_NOT_address: How synthetic view augmentation affects the authenticity of training signals compared to real observations

key_claim: Multiple approaches exist for distinguishing human art from AI-generated images to prevent fraud and model collapse
methodology: comparative analysis of supervised classifiers, diffusion model research tools, and professional artist identification methods
what_it_does_NOT_address: How the loss of authentic human artistic data affects the quality of future generative models

key_claim: LLMs are being misused to fabricate survey responses, threatening data authenticity and research integrity
methodology: content analysis of survey responses from Prolific platform to identify AI-generated responses
what_it_does_NOT_address: How the contamination of survey data with synthetic responses affects the reliability of human behavioral insights

key_claim: Self-consuming performative loops cause performance drops and induce emerging biases in LLMs trained on synthetic data
methodology: mathematical modeling of dynamic system with user feedback effects
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether incorporating authentic human social behavioral data can break these performative loops

key_claim: Adversarial data curation in self-consuming loops can manipulate model convergence toward maliciously designed distributions

what_it_does_NOT_address: How physically-verified authentic data could provide robustness against adversarial curation

key_claim: Co-evolving generative models exhibit three distinct convergence regimes including potential collapse scenarios

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether incorporating authentic human-generated multimodal data can stabilize co-evolving model dynamics

key_claim: Recursive stability and proportion of real vs synthetic data determine success of self-consuming training loops.

what_it_does_NOT_address: How physically-verified human behavioral data could stabilize self-consuming loops better than synthetic data.

key_claim: Self-generated data in image classification amplifies bias particularly in subgroup classifications across generations.
methodology: simulation environment with self-consuming loop integrating generative and classification models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human social behavioral data could reduce bias amplification in generative training.

key_claim: TV distance between synthetic and real data distributions can be controlled in self-consuming loops.
methodology: theoretical framework with bounds on total variation distance for diffusion models
what_it_does_NOT_address: How information entropy degrades specifically when authentic human data is replaced by synthetic data.

key_claim: Idealized correction functions can make self-consuming loops exponentially more stable than without correction.
methodology: theoretical analysis with proposed self-correction functions based on expert knowledge
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether physically-verified human data provides better correction signals than expert-designed functions.

key_claim: Few-shot and one-shot LLM generations create more challenging detection scenarios than zero-shot generations.
methodology: creation of adversarial detection dataset with few-shot generations and domain-specific continued pre-training
what_it_does_NOT_address: How detection robustness changes when training data shifts from authentic human to synthetic sources.

key_claim: Hybrid watermarking framework achieves synergy between logits-based and sampling-based schemes optimizing multiple objectives.
methodology: symbiotic watermarking framework using token entropy and semantic entropy for adaptive embedding
what_it_does_NOT_address: How watermarking effectiveness changes as training data becomes increasingly synthetic versus authentic.

key_claim: Adaptive watermarking on high-entropy tokens maintains text quality while preserving detectability and robustness.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether watermarking remains effective when models are trained on degraded web-scraped data.

key_claim: Blockchain-managed federated learning provides secure data provenance for Internet of Health Things applications.
methodology: federated learning with differential privacy implemented on blockchain for IoHT data management
limitation: fully decentralized FL is still a challenge due to coordination requirements
what_it_does_NOT_address: How data quality degrades when health monitoring relies on synthetic rather than authentic behavioral data.

key_claim: ProGen 1.2B-parameter language model generates proteins with fine-grained control using taxonomic and keyword conditioning.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether protein sequence data suffers from information degradation or diversity loss.

key_claim: LLMs are prone to hallucination, generating plausible yet nonfactual content in information retrieval systems.
methodology: comprehensive literature review and taxonomy of LLM hallucination research
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not analyze whether training data quality degradation contributes to hallucination phenomena.

key_claim: Group theory-based binary spring search algorithm with hybrid deep neural network effectively detects IoT network intrusions.
methodology: blockchain-based privacy preservation with group theory-based binary spring search algorithm and deep neural networks
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether IoT sensor data maintains authentic behavioral signals over time.

key_claim: GPT performs much better than English-language dictionary analysis at detecting psychological constructs across multiple languages.

methodology: entropy and TOPSIS-based evaluation framework for benchmarking machine learning models

key_claim: StarCoderBase outperforms every open Code LLM supporting multiple programming languages and matches OpenAI code models.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not analyze whether permissively licensed GitHub repositories suffer from code quality degradation over time.

key_claim: PPFL framework significantly improves privacy while incurring small system overheads at the client-side.

limitation: challenged by the limited memory size of current TEEs

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not quantify the loss of authentic human social signals during the autophagic process.

key_claim: A stochastic model can characterize information generation, indexing, and dissemination dynamics in the generative AI era.
methodology: development of RGB stochastic model for information dynamics
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how information dynamics affect preservation of physically-verified human behavioral data.

key_claim: 67% pool contamination leads to over 80% exposure contamination in retrieval systems.
methodology: controlled experiments with SEO-style and adversarial AI-generated content in retrieval systems
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not explore how retrieval collapse specifically degrades access to authentic human social behavioral data.

key_claim: The Enron Corpus represents a historical link between early ML datasets and contemporary foundation model training.
methodology: historical and genealogical analysis tracing dataset evolution from Enron to foundation models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not analyze whether physically-verified datasets like Enron provide superior training signals compared to web-scraped data.

key_claim: The trade-off between watermark strength and speculative sampling efficiency is not absolute.
methodology: constrained optimization problem formulation with quantitative watermark strength measure
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how watermarking affects the training value of authentic human-generated content.

key_claim: Co-evolving question synthesizer and reasoning solver through iterative optimization improves test-time training.
methodology: iterative optimization of two policies with progressive curriculum synthesis
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether synthetic curriculum data can replace authentic human reasoning patterns in training.

key_claim: ERM converges to the true mean but is outperformed by non-uniform weighting algorithms when learning from synthetic-natural data mixtures.
methodology: mathematical analysis of ERM performance on mixed synthetic-natural data distributions
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to distinguish authentic human behavioral signals from synthetic contamination in web-scraped training data.

key_claim: Google's SynthID-Text Tournament sampling achieves state-of-the-art detectability for AI-generated text identification.
methodology: theoretical analysis of Tournament-based watermarking with empirical validation
limitation: mean score is inherently vulnerable to increased tournament layer
what_it_does_NOT_address: How watermarking helps preserve authentic human data signals when training on web-scraped content.

key_claim: Iterative feedback in AI training converges to low-dimensional invariant structures causing neural resonance and model collapse.
methodology: Markov Chain modeling of feedback processes with experiments on diffusion models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether physically-verified human behavioral data can break the ergodicity conditions that cause neural resonance.

key_claim: Anchored Policy Optimization prevents exploration collapse by shifting from global Shape Matching to Support Coverage.
methodology: theoretical analysis of Recursive Space Contraction with Safe Manifold definition
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to maintain exploration diversity when training on degraded web-scraped data versus authentic human behavioral signals.

key_claim: Data Kernel Perspective Space provides mathematical guarantees for transformer-generated synthetic data quality.
methodology: mathematical analysis using Data Kernel Perspective Space framework
what_it_does_NOT_address: How DKPS can distinguish between synthetic data and authentic human behavioral data in training corpora.

key_claim: Recursive self-training without persistent external grounding causes entropy decay and variance amplification in LLMs.
methodology: formal analysis of recursive self-training as discrete-time dynamical system
limitation: collapse results apply specifically to closed-loop density matching without persistent external signal
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human social behavioral data can serve as the persistent external grounding signal needed.

key_claim: Classification accuracy on real test data consistently declines when training on synthetic data from newer T2I models.
methodology: large-scale synthetic dataset generation using T2I models from 2022-2025 with classifier training evaluation
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether incorporating authentic human behavioral data could counteract the aesthetic collapse in synthetic training datasets.

key_claim: Increasing AI ecosystem diversity mitigates knowledge collapse compared to single-model training approaches.
methodology: segmented training data across multiple language models with ten self-training iterations
limitation: training a single model on the entire dataset improves performance only in the s
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether diversity of authentic human data sources is more effective than diversity of AI models.

key_claim: Synthetic data introduces significant bias and variance into training objectives, causing popular generative models to collapse under repeated training.
methodology: statistical analysis of bias and variance in maximum likelihood estimation with synthetic data
what_it_does_NOT_address: How physically-verified authentic human data could prevent the observed synthetic data degradation.

key_claim: Majority-Guided VAE generates minority samples under majority-based prior guidance to inherit diversity and mitigate overfitting.
methodology: novel VAE architecture with majority-guided prior for minority class oversampling
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human behavioral data could provide better diversity signals than synthetic majority-guided generation.

key_claim: Synthetic MRI data contamination progressively degrades U-Net brain tumor segmentation accuracy as synthetic data proportions increase.
methodology: training U-Net models on progressively poisoned datasets with synthetic T1-Ce MRI scans from GAN
what_it_does_NOT_address: How authentic medical imaging data quality compares to synthetic alternatives for model robustness.

key_claim: Wavelet noise remover defense mechanism minimizes adversarial contamination on perturbed samples in data-free black box settings.
methodology: synthetic data construction via generative model with surrogate network training and wavelet decomposition
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether access to authentic training data would provide more robust defense than synthetic data construction.

key_claim: CFG scale is the key factor impacting model collapse in iterative diffusion model finetuning.
methodology: quantitative trait modeling from statistical genetics applied to Chain of Diffusion analysis
what_it_does_NOT_address: How authentic human-generated images could prevent the observed iterative quality degradation.

key_claim: Federated learning can mitigate systemic privacy risks while enabling collaborative model training across decentralized clients.
methodology: comprehensive survey of federated learning advances and open problems
what_it_does_NOT_address: How federated learning could preserve authentic human behavioral signals during distributed training.

key_claim: Highly variable gene selection improves data integration performance while scaling methods prioritize batch effect removal over biology retention.
methodology: benchmarking 68 method combinations on 85 batches across 13 atlas-level integration tasks with 14 evaluation metrics
what_it_does_NOT_address: How authentic single-cell data quality affects integration performance compared to processed atlas data.

key_claim: Generative AI with NLP and ASR can streamline clinical documentation by generating SOAP and BIRP notes from patient-clinician interactions.
methodology: case study applying natural language processing and automatic speech recognition with large language model prompting techniques
what_it_does_NOT_address: How authentic clinical interaction data quality compares to synthetic alternatives for documentation generation.

key_claim: Personalized federated learning addresses fundamental challenges of FL on heterogeneous data through specialized techniques.
methodology: taxonomy development and survey analysis of personalized federated learning techniques
what_it_does_NOT_address: How data heterogeneity in federated learning relates to information quality degradation in web-scraped training data.

key_claim: A lip-sync discriminator enables accurate lip movement morphing for arbitrary identities in unconstrained talking face videos.
methodology: training with powerful lip-sync discriminator and proposing new evaluation benchmarks
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether training data quality affects the authenticity of generated lip movements compared to human behavioral data.

key_claim: Bi-directional graph convolutional networks detect rumors by capturing both propagation and dispersion characteristics.
methodology: bi-directional graph convolutional networks operating on social media propagation structures
what_it_does_NOT_address: How information degradation in social media affects the reliability of rumor detection training data.

key_claim: BIG-bench provides comprehensive evaluation of language model capabilities across 204 diverse tasks.
methodology: collaborative benchmark development with 204 tasks from 450 authors across 132 institutions
what_it_does_NOT_address: How training data quality and diversity affect language model performance on these benchmark tasks.

key_claim: Existing open-source code models achieve close results to Codex in some programming languages.
methodology: systematic evaluation of large language models across various programming languages
what_it_does_NOT_address: How code training data quality and authenticity impact model performance compared to human-verified code.

key_claim: Deep learning systems for COVID-19 detection rely on confounding factors rather than medical pathology.
methodology: explainable AI techniques applied to analyze COVID-19 chest radiograph detection systems
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether verified authentic medical data provides more reliable training signals than web-scraped medical images.

key_claim: Comprehensive benchmarking reveals suitable algorithms, parameters, and testing criteria for anomaly-based intrusion detection systems.
methodology: systematic evaluation of 10 supervised and unsupervised ML algorithms on intrusion detection
what_it_does_NOT_address: How training data authenticity affects intrusion detection performance compared to synthetic or degraded network data.

key_claim: Federated learning provides privacy-preserving collaborative learning for vehicular IoT systems with distributed data.
methodology: survey analysis of federated learning applications in vehicular Internet of Things
what_it_does_NOT_address: How vehicular data quality and authenticity compare to web-scraped transportation data for training purposes.

key_claim: Created first publicly available SDN intrusion detection dataset for training network security systems.
methodology: dataset creation for SDN network intrusion detection
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how web-scraped network traffic data degrades over time or loses diversity.

key_claim: State-of-the-art machine learning and deep learning algorithms can effectively detect credit card fraud.
methodology: comparison of multiple ML algorithms including Extreme Learning Method, Decision Tree, Random Forest, SVM, Logistic Regression, XGBoost
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether fraud detection datasets from web sources suffer from information degradation.

key_claim: No single text embedding method dominates across all tasks in comprehensive evaluation.
methodology: benchmarking 33 text embedding models on 58 datasets across 8 tasks and 112 languages
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not investigate whether text embedding training data from web scraping experiences quality degradation over time.

key_claim: Data augmentation techniques can effectively address limited and constrained time series datasets for deep learning.
methodology: systematic review and taxonomic classification of time series data augmentation techniques
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether synthetic time series data can replace authentic behavioral signals from human sources.

key_claim: Diffusion probabilistic models can synthesize high-quality 3D medical images for MRI and CT.
methodology: application of diffusion probabilistic models to generate 3D medical imaging data evaluated by radiologists
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether synthetic medical images can capture authentic human physiological behavioral patterns.

key_claim: Matbench provides comprehensive benchmark for automated ML prediction of inorganic materials properties.
methodology: creation of 13 ML tasks with automated pipeline Automatminer for materials property prediction
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether materials science datasets suffer from web-scraping induced information degradation.

key_claim: Homomorphic encryption enables privacy-preserving federated learning without exposing model parameters.
methodology: integration of homomorphic encryption scheme with federated learning for privacy protection
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether encrypted federated data still suffers from underlying web-scraped data quality issues.

key_claim: EdgeFed reduces mobile device computational burden by separating local model updates to edge servers.
methodology: edge computing optimization of federated learning algorithm separating mobile device computations
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether edge-distributed training data maintains authentic human behavioral signals over web-scraped alternatives.

key_claim: Current sign language recognition methods require conceptual classification to interpret data correctly
methodology: comprehensive review of automated sign language recognition literature from 2014-2021
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine the quality or authenticity of sign language datasets used for training
theoretical_framework: general framework for sign language recognition

key_claim: SAVAER-DNN detects known and unknown attacks while improving detection of low-frequent attacks
methodology: supervised variational auto-encoder with WGAN-GP regularization combined with deep neural network
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether synthetic attack data maintains the authentic behavioral patterns of real attackers

key_claim: GPT-4 scores approximately 297 points on the uniform bar examination, significantly outperforming humans
methodology: zero-shot evaluation of GPT-4 on complete uniform bar examination components
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether GPT-4's training data includes authentic human legal reasoning patterns

key_claim: Created first publicly available global dataset of coregistered radar and optical observations for cloud removal
methodology: multisensor data fusion using large novel dataset with performance evaluation on image quality and diversity
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether synthetic cloud removal preserves authentic environmental patterns in Earth imagery

key_claim: Crossref contains over 106 million scholarly metadata records expanding at 11% annually
methodology: descriptive analysis of Crossref's scholarly metadata collection and ecosystem impact
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address the authenticity or quality degradation of metadata over time

key_claim: EdgeMediChain provides enhanced security and efficiency for healthcare data exchange using hybrid edge blockchain

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether synthetic health data maintains authentic patient behavioral patterns

key_claim: GenAI and LLMs enable creation of indistinguishable deepfakes and precision-crafted misinformation campaigns

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how synthetic content pollution affects the quality of future training datasets

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human conversation data provides richer persona signals than web-scraped dialogue corpora

key_claim: Detection of machine-generated text presents significant technical challenges with numerous open problems

what_it_does_NOT_address: How training data quality degradation affects machine-generated text detection accuracy

key_claim: T5, BART, and GPT-2 probabilities on QA tasks are poorly calibrated

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether training on authentic human knowledge sources improves model calibration versus web-scraped data

key_claim: Pre-trained Seq2Seq models outperform other data augmentation methods in low-resource classification settings
methodology: comparative evaluation of transformer-based data augmentation using class-conditioned pre-trained models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether augmented data maintains authentic human behavioral patterns versus synthetic artifacts

key_claim: EvoDiff generates biologically plausible proteins using evolutionary-scale sequence data with diffusion models for controllable protein generation.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether evolutionary-scale training data experiences information degradation or maintains authentic biological diversity signals.

key_claim: Deep learning techniques are the most reliable approaches for detecting image forgery including copy-move, splicing, and deepfake attacks.

what_it_does_NOT_address: How the proliferation of fake images affects the quality and authenticity of web-scraped training data.

key_claim: Federated learning enables collaborative cyber threat intelligence sharing across organizations while preserving privacy for network intrusion detection.

limitation: challenging to design ML-based detection using heterogeneous network data from different sources due to privacy concerns and lack of universal dataset format
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether federated learning can preserve authentic behavioral patterns when aggregating across diverse organizational data sources.

key_claim: PhishBench provides the first systematic benchmarking framework for evaluating phishing detection features under identical experimental conditions.
methodology: systematic benchmarking study using PhishBench framework with unified experimental conditions
what_it_does_NOT_address: How the evolution of phishing techniques affects the diversity and authenticity of web-based training datasets.

key_claim: Blockchain with SGX-based trusted execution environment securely aggregates federated learning models in Industrial IoT networks.
methodology: blockchain-based federated learning framework with Intel SGX trusted execution environment
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether secure aggregation preserves the authenticity of behavioral patterns from distributed IoT data sources.

key_claim: Federated learning addresses medical data scarcity and privacy issues while enabling institutions to collaborate without sharing sensitive information.

limitation: insufficient data prevents ML from reaching full potential without access to full spectrum of anatomies and pathologies
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether federated medical data aggregation maintains authentic patient behavioral patterns compared to centralized datasets.

key_claim: Blockchain technology offers traceability, immutability, and transparency features for decentralized waste management in smart cities.

limitation: existing waste management systems lack operational transparency, traceability, audit, security, and trusted data provenance features
what_it_does_NOT_address: How blockchain-based systems maintain authentic human behavioral data about waste disposal patterns versus synthetic or manipulated data.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether blockchain-verified medical records preserve authentic human health behavioral patterns compared to traditional medical databases.

key_claim: Homomorphic encryption combined with blockchain enhances privacy preservation in IoT healthcare applications.
methodology: combining homomorphic encryption techniques with blockchain technology for healthcare data protection
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine the quality or authenticity of the underlying health data being encrypted.

key_claim: Combining variational autoencoders and GANs solves the limitation of insufficient medical imaging data.
methodology: combining variational autoencoders and generative adversarial networks for brain tumor classification
limitation: large public datasets are rare in medicine
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether synthetic medical data preserves authentic diagnostic patterns from real patient populations.

key_claim: Blockchain-based decentralized storage eliminates trusted third-party auditors and single points of failure.
methodology: blockchain-based decentralized storage system design for IoT data sharing
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address the quality or diversity of data stored in the decentralized system.

key_claim: MMS project increases speech technology language coverage by 10-40x using religious text datasets.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether religious text represents authentic conversational speech patterns across cultures.

key_claim: Watermarking framework embeds detectable signals in LLM output with negligible quality impact.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how watermarking affects the authenticity of human-like language patterns.

key_claim: NovidChain blockchain platform enables privacy-preserving COVID-19 certificate verification.
methodology: blockchain-based privacy-preserving platform design for digital health certificates
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address verification of authentic health data versus potentially falsified certificate information.

key_claim: Flamingo-CXR generates radiology reports preferred by radiologists in 56.1-94% of cases.

limitation: wide distribution of preferences across the panel and clinical settings
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether AI reports capture authentic clinical reasoning patterns from human expertise.

key_claim: Falcon-180B outperforms PaLM and Chinchilla while being trained on 3.5 trillion web tokens.
methodology: training causal decoder-only models on diverse high-quality corpora predominantly from web data
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine potential degradation or homogenization in the predominantly web-scraped training data.

key_claim: LLMs have been applied to various SE tasks but comprehensive understanding of their application and limitations remains early stage.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether LLM training data quality degradation affects software engineering task performance.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how training data quality affects LLM performance in cybersecurity applications.

key_claim: Blockchain smart contracts can enhance VMI supply chain operations by addressing data integrity and transparency challenges.
methodology: blockchain smart contract system design for vendor managed inventory operations
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how authentic human behavioral data could improve supply chain predictions.

key_claim: GANs are being employed in cybersecurity IDS for creating adversarial examples, data augmentation, and handling unbalanced datasets.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether synthetic GAN-generated data can replace authentic human network behavior data.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether self-generated synthetic dialogue data suffers from information degradation compared to authentic human conversations.

methodology: survey discussing data-centric AI with holistic view of training data development, inference data development, and data maintenance
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address the specific problem of information degradation in web-scraped training data versus authentic human data.

methodology: generate-and-filter pipeline to extract training examples and training hundreds of diffusion models in various settings

methodology: systematic survey of RLHF problems and limitations with proposed auditing standards
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether alternative training signals from authentic human behavioral data could mitigate RLHF limitations.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether synthetic health records preserve authentic patient behavioral patterns found in real clinical interactions.

what_it_does_NOT_address: How federated learning addresses training data quality degradation from web-scraped sources.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether federated learning can preserve authentic behavioral signals while protecting privacy in training data.
